meaning: n.(哲学或文学上的)客观主义
examples: Objectivism holds that there is one true morality binding upon all of us.
Theoretically we should know the duality of globalization with subjectivism and objectivism.
The relationship between subjectivism and objectivism is not that of exclusion, but that of integration.
Objectivism is a philosophy for winners, leaders, producers, creators, alpha males and females and those on their way.
Admittedly, though, that kind of humanist objectivism only extends so far.
